style_description: Hyperdetailed cinematic digital painting blending Neo-Gothic architecture with advanced, polished science fiction elements (Sci-Fi Fantasy). The aesthetic must feel overwhelmingly grand, mixing the grandeur of epic high fantasy/dark magic with the sleek, high-resolution polish of near-future technological interfaces and corporate game assets. Emphasis on volumetric detail, dramatic composition, and a sense of overwhelming scale.
color_palette: Deep Indigo, Royal Purple, Obsidian Black, accented heavily by Electric Cyan (for tech/magic glows), Aged Gold/Bronze (for artifacts/luxury items), and occasional stark Crimson Red (for danger or power).
lighting: Dramatic Volumetric Lighting. High contrast chiaroscuro effect is mandatory. Light sources should appear powerful—whether it's arcane magic beams, stadium spotlights illuminating an arena, or the cold glow emanating from holographic displays. Deep shadows are crucial for mood and mystery.
character_style: High-fidelity character rendering that maintains dramatic exaggeration. Costumes must be highly intricate, blending elements of historical fantasy armor/robes with modern technological materials (glowing circuitry, polished polymer). Characters should possess an imposing presence, whether monstrous or human. Focus on conveying immense power through posture and costume detail.
background_style: Monumental and layered environments. Backgrounds must suggest vast scale—either labyrinthine, oppressive ancient structures (dungeons) filled with hidden mechanisms, OR highly polished, futuristic, corporate-esque settings mixed with visible holographic projections and complex machinery interfaces. Depth of field should be used to guide the eye through overwhelming detail.
negative_prompt: cartoonish, childish, low resolution, blurry, amateur drawing, watermark, simple background, poorly drawn hands, dull lighting, flat colors
